## Definition of Done (doc 00 §4)

| ID | Criterion | Status | Driven By |
|---|---|---|---|
| D1 | A new image dropped into data\incoming\ can be processed to draft masks for all 56 atomic parts with one CLI command. | open | MF-P2-08.04 |
| D2 | Draft->human-corrected->gold flow works in CVAT with SAM2-assisted editing, and export produces a valid gold package that passes 100% of format checks. | open | MF-P1-07.05, MF-P1-08.04 |
| D3 | Auto-QA battery (34 checks) runs on every package and blocks bad gold automatically. | complete | MF-P1-07.01, MF-P1-07.02, MF-P1-07.03, MF-P2-07.03, MF-P2-07.04, MF-P3-06.08 |
| D4 | VLM QA reviews overlays and routes agree/disagree cases correctly on a 20-image validation set. | open | MF-P4-EXIT |
| D5 | ≥300 human-approved gold packages exist with full manifests, hashes, and coverage matrix ≥80% cell coverage. | open | MF-P7-01.01, MF-P7-01.02 |
| D6 | Custom fine-tuned body-part model beats the SAM2+priors draft pipeline on the frozen test holdout for mean per-part IoU and boundary F-score, per the leaderboard. | open | MF-P5-07.02 |
| D7 | Hand/finger specialist model achieves finger-class mean IoU ≥ 0.70 on hand-crop holdout. | open | MF-P5-05.04 |
| D8 | ComfyUI node pack loads gold/predicted masks and produces derived inpaint masks inside a workflow. | open | MF-P6-03.03, MF-P6-EXIT |
| D9 | Full environment is reproducible from env\ lockfiles + models\model_registry.json on a clean machine. | complete | MF-P0-02.08, MF-P0-02.09, MF-P0-06.01, MF-P0-EXIT |
| D10 | Runbook operations (backup, retrain, failure mining) each executed successfully at least once. | open | MF-P7-03.06 |
| D11 | A photo containing 2 to max_instances_per_image people produces correctly-instanced, non-cross-bleeding, QA-passing gold packages for every promoted person, with interperson contact/occlusion correctly and reciprocally handled (doc 17). | open | MF-P8-10.05, MF-P8-EXIT |

## For AI Agents

Full command reference: `README.md` in this folder. Quick reference:
```
python tracker.py list --status open --phase P0
python tracker.py set MF-P0-01.01 --status complete --evidence "..."
python tracker.py set MF-P2-05.02 --status blocked --blocked-reason "..."
python tracker.py next -n 10
python tracker.py report
```
